query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of a textured fabric or carpet surface showing a gradient pattern radiating from a central bright area toward darker edges, with interwoven fibers creating a speckled appearance in tones of white, gray, and muted green.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred and defocused close-up of fabric or carpet texture with a radial gradient from blown-out white center to murky brown edges, rendered with smeared indistinct fiber detail, severely muted desaturated tones, and an abstract treatment that obscures any identifiable subject matter into pure texture and tonal drift.
